scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace=@saas-platform/client" "npm run dev --workspace=@saas-platform/server"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@saas-platform/client && npm run build --workspace=@saas-platform/server
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=@saas-platform/server && npm run test --workspace=@saas-platform/client
